category_sources: Official site https://www.ntp.org/ says the project produces the open source reference implementation of NTP.
source_facts.description says Network Time Protocol (NTP) Distribution.
display_name_sources: Official site https://www.ntp.org/ identifies the Network Time Protocol Project.
docs_sources: Official NTP documentation page https://www.ntp.org/documentation/ lists release documentation and reference materials.
repo_sources: Official NTP site links its open source reference implementation to bk.ntp.org; https://bk.ntp.org/ntp-stable/ is the stable source repository browser.
tags_sources: Official site https://www.ntp.org/ describes synchronizing computer clocks over a network.
source_facts.description identifies the Network Time Protocol distribution.
